mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , COUNT , CREATE_DATE FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND B.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{offset} AND #{limit}

SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , COUNT , CREATE_DATE FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND B.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND B.STATUS = 'Y'
AND (
BOARD_TITLE
BOARD_CONTENT
USER_ID
BOARD_TITLE
LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , COUNT , CREATE_DATE FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND B.STATUS = 'Y'
AND (
BOARD_TITLE
BOARD_CONTENT
USER_ID
BOARD_TITLE
LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD(BOARD_NO , BOARD_TYPE , CATEGORY_NO , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , BOARD_WRITER) VALUES(SEQ_BNO.NEXTVAL , 1 , #{category} , #{boardTitle} , #{boardContent} , #{boardWriter})
INSERT INTO ATTACHMENT(FILE_NO , REF_BNO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , FILE_PATH) VALUES(SEQ_FNO.NEXTVAL , SEQ_BNO.CURRVAL , #{originName} , #{changeName} , #{filePath})
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , CREATE_DATE , BOARD_CONTENT FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT FILE_NO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , FILE_PATH FROM ATTACHMENT WHERE REF_BNO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CATEGORY ORDER BY CATEGORY_NO ASC
